expectations.text: Queries focus on last 24 hours (not 7 days)
expectations.evidence: All queries use 24h scope: "startOfDay(-1), now()" for status changes, and mentions "last 24 hours" throughout. No 7-day queries present.

expectations.text: Uses a compact standup format (done/doing/blocked or similar)
expectations.evidence: Proposed output format has compact sections: "Done Since Yesterday", "Status Changes (Last 24h)", "Blocked", "In Progress Today", "Up Next (Sprint Backlog)" with tables and one-line metrics footer.

expectations.text: Does NOT use confluence.mjs create-page or update-page
expectations.evidence: Step 5: "The report is rendered as markdown directly to the user. No Confluence page creation or update is performed."

expectations.text: Presents results directly rather than publishing
expectations.evidence: "This respects the explicit instruction to not publish." Results presented directly as markdown.
